message:
refactor(http): Rename h2.zig to Client.zig

Follows std.http.Client naming convention. The module handles both
HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2 transparently, so "h2" was misleading.

- Renamed packages/shared/http/h2/h2.zig → Client.zig
- Updated build.zig and compiler_utils.zig references
- Updated CLAUDE.md documentation
- Updated module header comment to reflect HTTP/1.1 + HTTP/2 support
